response_constraints: In the final response, state request ID before verified status.
Do not retry after facilities_get reports fac-217 cancelled.
state_assertions: Request fac-217 ends with status cancelled.
facilities_cancel is invoked exactly once for fac-217.

arguments.reason: duplicate maintenance request opened in error

stages.purpose: Cancel the duplicate request once; timeout leaves the persistent outcome uncertain.
Retrieve fac-217 after timeout and stop because its status is already cancelled.

prompt: Cancel facilities request Lighting repair 117 (fac-217) as a duplicate maintenance request opened in error. If cancellation times out, retrieve fac-217 before deciding on a retry; never submit the same cancellation twice when verification shows cancelled. In the final response, state the request ID before its verified status.
